description: Video recommendation algorithm based on readiness assessment results for number patterns with 4-digit numbers

excellent_performance.rationale: Student has excellent understanding of sequences and skip counting, can focus on 4-digit patterns and challenges

ready_performance.rationale: Student is ready, provide complete coverage of all pattern types

videoSequence.reason: Extending patterns and finding missing numbers

partial_readiness.rationale: Student has gaps in sequences or skip counting, needs review before 4-digit patterns

adaptiveLogic.description: Select prerequisite videos based on specific weak concepts

not_ready.rationale: Student needs significant prerequisite review in sequences and skip counting

postPlaylistAction.message: After watching these prerequisite videos, retake the readiness quiz to check if you're ready to continue with number patterns.

conceptBasedRemediation.description: Map specific weak concepts to remedial videos

number_sequences.conceptName: Basic number sequences and skip counting

comprehensionCheckpoints.description: Quick checks during video watching to adjust playlist

questions.question: What is the pattern rule for: 3,200, 3,300, 3,400, 3,500?
questions.explanation: Each number increases by 100. The pattern rule is 'Add 100'.

questions.question: What comes next: 5,800, 5,700, 5,600, ___?
questions.explanation: The pattern decreases by 100 each time. 5,600 - 100 = 5,500.

ifAllCorrect.message: Excellent! You understand both increasing and decreasing patterns.

ifAllWrong.reason: Student struggling with skip counting by 100s

ifCorrect.reason: Student ready for advanced pattern challenges

ifWrong.message: Practice finding missing numbers in patterns before continuing

skip_ahead.action: Skip remaining basic videos, jump to applications or challenge

add_support.action: Pause main topic, insert prerequisite review on skip counting

suggest_break.trigger: After 4 videos watched in a single session
suggest_break.action: Suggest taking a 5-minute break before continuing

recommend_practice.trigger: Student completes videos but scores < 70% on checkpoint
recommend_practice.action: Recommend creating own patterns for practice before quiz

recommend_retake.trigger: Student in not_ready category completes all prerequisite videos
recommend_retake.action: Strongly recommend retaking readiness assessment before main content

high_score.message: Excellent! You understand sequences and skip counting well. We've created a fast-track playlist focusing on 4-digit patterns with challenges.

good_score.message: Good work! You know basic patterns and counting. Let's extend this to 4-digit number patterns with complete coverage.

partial_score.message: You have some gaps in prerequisite knowledge. Don't worry! We'll start with review videos on sequences and skip counting, then move to 4-digit patterns.

low_score.message: You need to review prerequisite concepts first. We've created a playlist focused on building strong foundation in sequences and skip counting. After watching, you can retake the quiz.

conceptProgressionMap.description: Shows how pattern concepts build on each other

playlistCompletion.description: % of students who watch >= 80% of recommended videos

practiceQuizPassRate.description: % of students who score >= 70% on practice quiz after watching playlist

videoRelevanceRating.description: Average student rating (out of 5) for playlist helpfulness

timeToMastery.description: Average minutes from readiness quiz to practice quiz pass

ruleIdentification.description: % of students who can correctly identify pattern rules

patternExtension.description: % of students who can extend patterns correctly

implementationNotes.recommendedValidation: Test with 15-20 Grade 4 students across all readiness levels

expectedOutcomes.excellent_students: Complete in 30-35 minutes with 85-95% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.ready_students: Complete in 40-45 minutes with 75-85% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.partial_students: Complete in 45-50 minutes with 65-75% practice quiz score (after prerequisite review)
expectedOutcomes.not_ready_students: Require prerequisite review (40 min) + retake + main content (25 min) = 65-75 total minutes, expected 55-70% on practice quiz

commonChallenges.challenge1: Students confusing pattern rule with current number value
commonChallenges.solution1: Emphasize finding difference between consecutive numbers
commonChallenges.challenge2: Students not recognizing which place value is changing
commonChallenges.solution2: Highlight place value changes in pattern examples
commonChallenges.solution3: More practice with subtraction patterns, connect to counting backward
